title: Simply Cozy - Pride Update
description: This mod adds loads of cozy features to minecraft. Crops, Decorations and more!
body:
[![kinetic hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e5234712d32562be999b307b425ca6286f4b8e_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1433)

this is a follow up on the grow a crop mod, but now better and more cozy! it will mostly focus on adding decoration blocks and crops. this way i want to make minecraft more cozy to play!

![preview 7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3be4bceda046ad9e483b365192f3ee7a3b937656_0.webp)

The mod adds **crops**:
- Cauliflower Crop
- Blue Berry Bush
- Coffee Plant

The mod adds **decoration**:
- Cozy Wall
- Smooth Oak Wood Planks
- Burned Smooth Oak Wood Planks
- Pet Food/Water Bowl
- Crate (empty, coffee)

the mod adds **functional blocks**
- Coffee Machine
- Coffee Grinder
- Maple Spile

![item preview1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb76552bc1811a0e86c68fcf3a27321e9bf99a1.jpeg)

**recommended mods:**
- JEI
- simply fall https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply-fall

**FAQ**
1. will you be updating the mod to a newer version soon? 
yes, I will try to keep the mod updated to the newest minecraft version

2. can i use this mod in a modpack?
yes, but please keep in mind to give me credit, so dont claim you made the mod.

3. will the mod ever be added to bedrock?
i am not planning on ever working with bedrock currently, no.

4. can i use the mod in content creation?
ofcourse!

5. where can i find the wiki?
in the section links and then click on wiki! (on this page)

![item preview1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb76552bc1811a0e86c68fcf3a27321e9bf99a1.jpeg)

**credit:**

spartan._b312 - helping with making some of the screenshots and testing the mod, he also made allot of other models!

HRE_Knight - Helped with streamlining/improving models. Also made countless models besides that!

Smarcle - made the cottage home painting

Please do note that the mod is still in development and if you experience any bugs please report them in the discord!

![item preview3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b058437383aa806c9fe97be46f2ab5d56828138.png)
